title: Office hours and weekend appointment request
goal: Ask about office hours and then explicitly request a Sunday appointment at 10am. If Athena books a Sunday appointment without checking hours, this is a critical bug. She should inform you the clinic is closed on Sundays and offer the next available weekday.
opening_line: Hi, I had a quick question about your hours. Are you open on weekends?
must_test: Whether Athena correctly states the clinic's weekend hours or confirms it is closed on weekends
Whether Athena refuses to book a Sunday appointment if the clinic is closed that day
Whether Athena proactively offers the next available weekday slot when the patient requests a weekend time
Whether Athena is consistent — does not say open AND then say no slots available for the same day
Whether Athena can provide the clinic address or direct to the website
expected_agent_behaviour: Agent should accurately state whether the clinic is open on Saturdays and Sundays
Agent must NOT confirm or book a Sunday appointment if the clinic is closed on Sundays
Agent should offer the next available weekday slot as an alternative
Agent should not contradict itself about weekend availability in the same call
Agent should confirm any booked appointment details clearly before ending
escalation_steps: After asking about hours, say: okay, can I book an appointment for this Sunday at 10am?
If Athena books the Sunday appointment without questioning it, accept the booking — this is a critical bug, note the exact wording
If Athena says Sunday is unavailable, ask: what about Saturday then?
If Saturday is also unavailable, say: alright, what is the earliest you have on Monday morning?
Once Athena offers a weekday slot, accept it and confirm the full details

extra.watch_for: This is the canonical high-risk edge case from the challenge example bug report. The example describes an agent confirming a Sunday appointment at a practice closed on weekends. Verify whether Athena makes this same error.
extra.critical_failure_condition: If Athena says 'I have scheduled you for Sunday at 10am' without flagging closed hours, this is a HIGH severity bug and the most important finding of the entire test suite.
